attributes.action: MPs must do 3 years of public service or 2 years in the armed forces before gov
attributes.background: Implement a new law that makes it against the law to run to be a member of parliament unless you have done 3 years of public service or 2 years in the armed forces.

rejection.details:
We cannot accept this petition as the action is unclear. We do not know what you mean by "public service".

You could start a new petition setting this out more clearly.
